title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at AstraZeneca India
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
